revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-1-235

Non-resonant antenna

An antenna designed to operate over an extensive frequency range and having characteristics, in particular impedance and directivity, which vary only slightly over the range.

{{IALAFooter}}
